target: 7. Hitogashima Shrine
…Hello.
Ah… Hello.

I came to talk with you, Karikiri-san. 
Do you have time?

Yes, that's fine.
Then come in - it'd be awkward to stand here talking.
Do you sense any shadow?
…None…
As Nagumo-sensei said, you're definitely not a shadow.

So… 
But don't let your guard down.
Yeah.
I brought some cold barley tea for you.

Ugh, it's so hot every day…
Here, please.
Yes… thank you.
In Tokyo, is it like that? Is it hotter than Wakayama?

Well…
It's not really any different.

…Hey, Karikiri-san. 
You came to Tokyo last year, right?
Huh?
You said that yesterday. That you went to a game event in Tokyo.

Ah! Right, the one near the sea!
Makuhari, right? It's in Chiba…
Ugh… it was so hot there.
There were way too many people…

You really like games, huh?
What kind do you play?

Back then I only played RPGs…
Now I prefer PC FPS and simulation games.
Are you going this year too?

…No.
This year's probably impossible…
That RPG remake I wanted to play… when is it coming out?
It's your favorite, huh?

Of course!
The world-building really appeals to me. 
Since it came out at the end of an era…

Its art and music have this decadent atmosphere.
It makes you think about how to live your life.

Life…
For me, games are like novels for you.

Have you heard of the novel "Masho" by Nagumo Ryunosuke?
I really like it…

It's about me… 
My story, I think that way these days.
Masho…

I don't know that novel, but I do know the thought experiment "Masho." 
Is it about something like that?

Yes…
One day, a copy of the protagonist appears and takes over his life.
No one at home or school notices it's a clone.
The copy has the protagonist's memories, personality and DNA - perfectly copied.

In that case… is this clone considered to be the same person?
What do you think?

That's…
It would have to be "the same person," wouldn't it.
Human cells are constantly replaced through metabolism…
Through cell division.
It's just a matter of whether it happens in an instant or gradually.
So, the Masho is essentially identical to the original.
That's what I think.

Shinpei-kun, do you always think about things like this?
You asked me yesterday about the shadow too.
I also researched the Hiruko legend.
At first I wanted to ask you, but Hizuru explained it in detail.

About 300 years ago during the Edo period,
a god named Hiruko drifted to this island.

If we use sci-fi imagination, it might have come from "outside" of the world.
Deep in the ocean or far away in space… 
Or maybe another dimension.

Let's assume it came from outer space…
In any case, it was a lifeform that drifted through the cosmos.
It would copy nearby objects to transform and use their information as nourishment.
But in space, the things it could change were limited.

Probably as a meteorite that came to Earth. 
It fell into the sea, which is full of life…

Fish, seaweed, corals and anemones… 
It probably copied many things.
How much time passed there…

This is just Hizuru's imagination. 
But after that, it connects to the Hiruko legend in documents.

300 years ago,
it transformed into a whale.

Then, for some reason it drifted to this island…
It copied the daughter of a fisherman who came to see the whale.
That's when Shadow Sickness began.
…Indeed, the Hiruko legend says exactly that…

Shinpei-kun. 
Do you really think this is true?

Yes, the shadow exists.
And it killed Ushio and my parents…
Tomorrow, it will kill everyone gathered in this shrine grounds.
Haha…

Sorry, Shinpei-kun… 
You've read too many books.
That's also very inappropriate.
It makes sense that you're upset about Ushio dying, but please rest more.
I already know everything.

Karikiri-san.
You know this is true, don't you?

Because you… 
you were there for all of it.
Look at this photo.
It's a small photo, so I didn't notice at first.

But when I showed it to Hishigata,
he said that was you.

The man on the right is probably 
Hishigata-sensei's grandfather, isn't he?

In a photo from 70 years ago…
Why are you in it?

Karikiri Masahito.
No…

Hishigata, Shigeo!
You're the one called Shide!
(If needed, I won't hesitate to shoot!)
Shinpei-kun…
Don't move.
If you move, I'll shoot.
…Next time you move, I'll kill you.

Hishigata…
What did you say?

You won't answer my questions.
It's me who will ask them.

After escaping from the gymnasium yesterday night,
you decided to cut down Hishigata-sensei.

You sent Nurse Negoro 
to retrieve Ushio's body and eliminate Hishigata.

There is another photo too.
Look at it.

Nurse Negoro scanned Hishigata-sensei's memories,
found that the picture was hidden in a safe, 
and tried to erase it…

Because there you are.
Your true identity is captured on that photo.

But Hishigata-sensei hid the safe with Tokiko…
He didn't know where it was.

Going back 40 years,
that was a photo taken by Hishigata-sensei's father.

You're not a shadow, 
but you aren't just an ordinary human either…

(With the clues I've gathered, 
I arrived at this truth)

(4th loop, July 23rd.
While exploring the old ward of Hishigata Clinic,
I found a strange statue)

(If that was indeed Hiruko's image, 
there might be connections between Hishigata Clinic and Hitogashima Shrine)
(5th loop, July 22nd)
(After the fake time-loop with Nagumo and Nezu at Fourth Battery Site)
The four-armed one might be Karikiri Masahito.

Huh!?
Karikiri's son!
You guys think that too, right?
…Yeah…

If Hiruko is the mother of Heine, 
then Hitogashima Shrine that worships her would be very suspicious. 
After all, Karikiri-san's a shrine priest.
But… isn't Karikiri human?

Why does the four-armed one hide its face? 
If it's a shadow, it could just transform into someone else.

What if the truth is that he's human and 
"can't copy?"

True, I've never seen him scan someone…
But prints were made.

The black mud that makes up the shadow… 
It's an unknown exotic substance.

If the four-armed one is a human wearing that mud like armor…
…

That black mud which constitutes the shadow…
It seems to be an unknown exotic substance.
If those four arms were encasing that mud like armor…?

Hiding my face would be bad if seen…
In other words, someone we all know…

The Four-Armed Shadow's goal was Heine…
Was it to revive that child…?

…On the day after tomorrow, during the summer festival,
the shadows will kill many people…
It seems they plan to feed them to Heine.

Though I don't know what comes after that ritual,
the Four-Armed Shadow definitely called it "Ending"…

(6th loop, July 22nd.
After Koba Mart entry halted――)
Shinpei-kun… don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Then we'll go as well.
There's something I need to say first…
Something you want to say?

It's definitely Karikiri Masahito.
I confirmed it through Ushio's memories.
How did you figure that out!?

I've always disliked the shrine master…
The Four-Armed Shadow feels exactly the same!

What's this!! 
It's your intuition, isn't it!?

Even if you hide your face in armor,
you can't conceal humanity…

Moreover, since Nezu's "Shadow Sewing"
didn't work on him,
it raises the possibility he's human.

But Karikiri was supposed to be at the funeral…
He should still be there…
Maybe he left the funeral to the shadow.

If he actually has a body…
There's the assassination option…

If he's just human,
killing him would be easy.

Act oblivious and go to the shrine,  
then BAM while chatting.

No! That's murder!!!
We need more definite proof!

If he is human…  
he might respond to negotiation.
I just hope so…

Ushio, I need to confirm.
Can we hack Mio and make her one of us?

Oh! Right!
If you block Heine's telepathy,  
it'll work like me!

(7th loop, July 22nd.
After gym battle――)

Fire was effective against shadows…
The normal shadow merged with Shide died instantly.  
It also slowed down Shide's movements.

Furthermore, through Ushio's "hacking,"  
it was accidentally discovered someone is inside Shide.

Shide has a burn on his left hand.  
That'll be an indicator of the real identity.

(7th loop, July 22nd.
In Hishigata Clinic basement――)

He is Heine's guardian,  
and her first child.
The original name was Hishigata Kamadori.
Founder and first director of the Hishigata Clinic.

She still didn't know yet…
About Shide's true identity…
This child just hid the safe on my orders.
And this is…
W… What's this photo!?

The Hishigata family has long been in charge of the island's rituals,  
but during the Edo period, Kamadori's father started pretending to be a doctor…
That was the origin of Hishigata Clinic…

Wait!  
Hishigata… isn't that Karikiri!?  
The shrine is…

Hishigata and Karikiri were originally the same family…
Karikiri branched off from Hishigata.
Do you know the Hiruko legend?
The day Hiruko washed ashore…

Hiruko became Heine,  
and was worshipped as a god by the islanders…
…That's right.

Eventually, Kamadori…
Had a child with the deity.

Not born from a flat surface as shadows usually are.  
From a three-dimensional…
Heine was impregnated and made to give birth…

Then he claimed to be the "God's Husband,"  
and started using the name Hoine and Karikiri…
Then Kamadori had a brother.

After Heine's birth, the Hishigata family split.  
From then on Karikiri families worshipped the deity…
The Hishigatas became a medical family.
So Shide and the Hishigata are distant relatives through blood!?
…What nonsense.
…So what happened to that child!?

As he grew up,  
he looked exactly like Kamadori.

That's probably the nature of shadows…
When Heine gets pregnant,  
the child is a clone of the father.
That's where it starts…
Seeing this, Kamadori awakened a desire…
…No way…

He made Heine copy his personality and memories,  
and implanted them into a clone.
That's how he achieved "youthfulness."

Nauseating…  
That's why I couldn't stand him…

It was my father who took it…
This photo too, my father took it.
It's from when his body was born.

Shide has been repeating this secret technique,  
having himself birthed by the mother who gave him life…
He's been living since 300 years ago until now.
…<color=#GF_TIPS_003>you</color>'s body was born 40 years ago.
But the inside is Kamadori from 300 years ago…!!
Human and shadow hybrid!!!
